tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # move 2 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "LAN_to_WAN_egress_control"
        set uuid 0bb4059c-2941-51f1-d73e-5762e9348514
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS"
        set logtraffic all
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
